en.extract:
The scaled flowerpiercer (Diglossa duidae) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the tepuis of Brazil and Venezuela.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.

The '''scaled flowerpiercer''' ('''''Diglossa duidae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in the [[tepui]]s of [[Brazil]] and [[Venezuela]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical]] or [[tropical]] moist [[montane forest]]s and subtropical or tropical high-altitude [[shrubland]].
